ablation_results.conclusion: Memory improves returns 20% under partial obs. Memory+partial even outperforms full visibility. Exit criteria MET.

known_issues: Reflex overrides still high (40-100/episode) due to wall_center > 0.7 threshold
Fatigue often maxes to 1.0 from excessive turning
Agent still starves most episodes despite eating occasionally
next_actions: Plan Stage 4: Global Workspace — limited-capacity broadcast system
Consider fatigue tuning before Stage 4 (agent exhausts from turning)
Review holonomic findings for Stage 4a integration planning

completed_stages.0: Embodied sandbox — env, agent, reward, logging
completed_stages.1: Homeostatic organism — reflexes, actor-critic, TD learning
completed_stages.2: Predictive control — world model, surprise signal, sleep consolidation
completed_stages.3: Partial observability and memory — episodic recall, food_visible_range, validated via ablation
